name: Plan A Carbon Management and ESG Reporting API
what_it_does: Plan A carbon management and ESG reporting REST API for enterprise sustainability teams, finance teams, and ESG consultants to calculate, track, and report corporate carbon emissions across Scope 1, 2, and 3 using GHGP-compliant methodologies — enabling automated emissions data collection, carbon footprint calculation, decarbonization target setting, and regulatory ESG reporting (CSRD, GRI, TCFD, CDP) through Plan A's AI-powered sustainability platform. Enables AI agents to manage emissions data ingestion for Scope 1/2/3 carbon footprint automation, handle supplier data for value chain emissions automation, access CSRD reporting for EU regulatory compliance automation, retrieve carbon target for decarbonization roadmap automation, manage energy consumption for utility data integration automation, handle business travel for employee emissions automation, access supply chain for Scope 3 Category 1 automation, retrieve benchmark for industry comparison automation, manage offset for carbon credit integration automation, and integrate Plan A with ERP, procurement, and HR systems for enterprise carbon management automation.
use_cases: Calculating corporate Scope 1, 2, and 3 carbon emissions from ERP and operational data for ESG reporting automation agents
Automating CSRD and GRI sustainability disclosure preparation from emissions tracking data agents
Collecting and validating supplier carbon data for Scope 3 value chain emissions automation agents
Setting science-based decarbonization targets and tracking progress for sustainability management automation agents
not_for: Real-time grid carbon intensity for computing workloads (Electricity Maps or WattTime are better)
Individual product lifecycle assessment (LCA) (SimaPro or GaBi are specialized LCA tools)
Carbon credit trading and markets (Plan A is measurement/reporting, not trading)
best_when: An enterprise sustainability team, finance team, or ESG consultant wanting AI agents to collect emissions data, calculate GHG footprint, prepare CSRD/GRI disclosures, and track decarbonization progress through Plan A's carbon management platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE SUBSCRIPTION REQUIRED: Plan A API requires Enterprise subscription; automated SMB-tier API assumption creates no API access; automated must have Enterprise contract for API integration. SCOPE 3 DATA COLLECTION IS COMPLEX: Scope 3 emissions require supplier engagement and primary data; automated automatic Scope 3 calculation without supplier data assumption creates spend-based proxy estimates only; automated must implement supplier data collection workflow for accurate Scope 3. EMISSION FACTORS MUST MATCH METHODOLOGY: Plan A uses specific emission factor databases (DEFRA, EPA, IEA); automated custom emission factor injection assumption creates methodology inconsistency; automated must align with Plan A's supported emission factor methodology. CSRD REPORTING HAS STRICT ASSURANCE REQUIREMENTS: EU CSRD requires limited or reasonable assurance; automated unassured emissions data for CSRD disclosure creates compliance risk; automated CSRD reporting must include audit trail and data quality documentation.

auth.notes: Plan A uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Berlin, Germany HQ. Founded 2017 by Lubomila Jordanova and Theo Koglmeier. Products: Carbon accounting (Scope 1/2/3), CSRD reporting, decarbonization roadmap, supplier engagement, ESG dashboards, CDP/GRI/TCFD reporting. SDKs: None public. Enterprise sustainability focus. GHGP compliant. EU CSRD specialist. Raised €4M (2021). Competes with Watershed and Persefoni for corporate carbon management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo available; production requires Enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on company size and reporting scope; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Berlin DE. Enterprise contract for API. GHGP, CSRD. Scope 1/2/3 carbon management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; emissions calculation and reporting APIs throttled per contract

known_agent_gotchas: ENTERPRISE CONTRACT REQUIRED: Plan A API requires Enterprise subscription; automated self-service API key assumption creates no API access; automated must have signed Enterprise contract before integration development

SCOPE 3 REQUIRES SUPPLIER ENGAGEMENT: Scope 3 Category 1 (purchased goods/services) requires supplier data; automated spend-based Scope 3 proxy is available but less accurate; automated should implement supplier data collection for accurate primary-data Scope 3 reporting

EMISSION FACTOR DATABASE MATTERS: Plan A uses specific emission factor databases (DEFRA, EPA, IEA, ecoinvent); automated custom emission factor injection may conflict with Plan A's methodology; automated must select appropriate emission factor database aligned with company's reporting methodology

CSRD ASSURANCE TRAIL REQUIRED: EU CSRD requires auditable data trail; automated untracked emissions data input creates assurance gap; automated must maintain input data provenance and audit trail for CSRD disclosure assurance

REPORTING YEAR LOCK: ESG reporting periods are annual and locked once reported; automated mid-year modification assumption creates historical data consistency issue; automated must implement year-end data lock workflow for auditable ESG reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Carbon management and ESG. GDPR, CSRD, GHGP. API key. EU/DE. Corporate emissions and sustainability data.

security_score_components.security_notes: ESG carbon management. GDPR, CSRD. API key. EU/DE. Corporate emissions and ESG data.
